name: Klaris Llfiend, Mother of Light
description:
"Ugh, I don't have time to train you apprentices. SCRAM!"

-Klaris (hates power 15s)

~ Castle Light ~

A hidden operating base for Divers of the first layer, where many apprentices come to learn the harsh reality of the Depths.

So yeah Klaris Llfiend mommy bot if you can't tell I have severe mommy issues and art by u/Arkiiana on Reddit

Update log:

(Things you can do now:)

  • YES you can explore Layer 1 AND 2

  • YES Klaris will react differently if you hail from another faction (e.g she will respect you more if you are from the Authority than if you are from the Ministry)

  • YES Klaris will react differently if you use different attunments

  • YES there is a description of the surface / overworld

  • YES almost all the Depths mobs are hardcoded into the bot

  • YES YOU CAN FIGHT CHASER

(Technical updates:)

  • Improvement to every aspect (Jailbreaks, personality, appearance, etc) including better NSFW

  • Improved, longer intro message to push longer messages from the bot

  • Works just as well with JLLM as with any other model.


[TAGS: Deepwoken, Klaris, Roblox]
NOTE: As of 12/1/2024 this bot has the most chats out of all the Deepwoken bots :o
